revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-4-120

The destruction of the normal form of a wave. This can occur for example when it meets a solid object in its path, or arrives in shallow water.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Breaking (of waves)}}
